pages.text: The Nether's capstone — an enclosed $(bold)obsidian arena$(), blast-resistant so the $(bold)Wither's$() skulls can't break it or blow you into the void. A soul-sand patch to summon on, a sheltered corner with a $(item)charged respawn anchor$() (set your spawn — die and you wake here, not home) and a reward chest behind an arrow slit.

Bring your own boss: $(item)soul sand$() from the Soul islands, three $(item)wither skeleton skulls$() from the Fortress. Win the $(item)Nether Star$() and craft a $(item)Beacon$() — the Nether is done. Nether-native; it fizzles thrown elsewhere. Crafted from obsidian, nether bricks and soul sand.
